params.name: wizard_step
params.comment: Last completed step number (0 = wizard not started, 5 = wizard complete). Added v1.0.148.

params.name: wizard_completed_at
params.comment: Timestamp when the dealer finished the feed setup wizard. Null until completion. Added v1.0.148.

params.name: wizard_state_json
params.comment: Cached wizard state - parsed sample, discovered fields, current mapping, validation report. JSON. Added v1.0.148.
